name: chain__heres_an_actual_way_to_make_10k_a_mont
method: heres an actual way to make $10k a month from tiktok + organic affiliate tt slides is probably the best way to make ai content for a few reasons > easy and not time consuming to make > much harder to

stages.task: scan affiliate networks for high-commission products trending on TT (ClickBank, Amazon Associates, Impact)
generate 5-7 AI images per product using prompts optimized to avoid AI detection, lifestyle/product-in-use aesthetic
write hook caption + slide text overlays + CTA (link in bio language TT allows)
post to TikTok via Playwright automation, warmup-aware scheduling, rotating posting times
track completion rates + affiliate click-throughs, flag winners for repost/remix, kill underperformers
